samples:
I remember when I first spoke
Your name into the air
It was so simple to say "Her"
Yet there's a sadness in me...



And as we went round and round
You sang along with me
"When love is gone, nothing remains"
She said there's no reason to stay





Still you try
Yes you try
Still you try




Kept inside your prison cell
Soul torn apart by jealousy
Innocent white faced pale as snow
Old memories haunt us both


Lost within this forest
As ghosts surround her throne
Pale ghost of innocence
White face withered soul




Still you try
Yes you try
Still you try




Came for all her wealth she took it clean away
Her gaze was cold and empty when she spoke her final words:
"Sleep now child", she said, "sleep"





Still you try
Yes you try
Still you try


Still you try
Yes you try
Still you try

Lost in the midst of winter
My body aching for sleep
In a forest far from home
She spoke her name to me


Came clean and told all I sought
Her friendship, her love
She gave away everything
And her heart went astray


As she rose she rose she rose...
As she rose she rose she rose...
As she rose she rose she rose...
As she rose she rose she rose...


Gone alone she wept her grief
She had lied to ease her fear
She could not forget how close they came
How near she went to despair


Still as she rose she rose she rose...
Still as she rose she rose she rose...
Still as she rose she rose she rose...
Still as she rose she rose she rose...



Ghost in her embrace is whispering
"It's time you leave"
Soul torn apart by longing
To lose what you know"


Ghost in her embrace is whispering
"It's time you leave"
Soul torn apart by longing
To lose what you know"

Once again the year is here,
An evening for celebration...
And still there's that familiar fear
That someone came along and said: "Farewell"


The final word was spoken now
I hung my head in shame...
A sorrow luring above me now, as morning comes
Searching the depths of your heart,
Would you ever leave with me?
In spite of all we had gone through...




Have I sought it out, to find solace in friendship alone?
Have I shunned the light, because you died inside?
Have I given up, on a wish to belong
Have I lost sight, have I turned round now?



Found her name in smoke
She rose and spoke
"You are mine"
Her voice became hers no more".


Kept a dagger near by her side
Shantelle said she would be mine
Old sorrows returned after all
Her plight is cast into the flood


Lost a trail within days
Redemption from faithless deeds

Summer is miles away
Winter has come to stay
Leaves are withered on the trees
Snow falls and hangs in the breeze


Summer days linger no more
Searching the trees for more
Ah..


Summer sun sets for all eternity
Shedding warmth unto the coldest night




White faced haggard biding time alone in the snow
Pale as ghost haunted by memories
Blank stare into darkness waiting for you to go home
Afraid of what will never be





Summer days linger no more
Searching the trees for more
Ah...



Summer sun sets for all eternity
Shedding warmth unto the coldest night





White faced haggard biding time alone in the snow
Pale as ghost haunted by memories
Blank stare into darkness waiting for you to go home
Afraid of what will never be






Summer days linger no more
Searching the trees for more
Ah...
Ah..
Ah...
Ah...
Ah...
Ah...
Ah...
Ah...
Ah...

The fog rose from the ground, pouring into my lungs
It's clinging to me, winding through my veins


Ghosting round every corner I can't get ahead of this loneliness
Searching for something worthwhile to do with myself



Found her name and number in a sea of wasted youth
She spoke and she lied "I am waiting"
Her eyes are empty as she whispers 'I love you'
My heart said "Yes" before my spirit was told




Once undone all entwined together like a jumbled mess
Tearing apart what had once been stuck together
Screaming out her name when they went "Ghost"
Losing her pride as everything falls down

Found her name and number in a sea of wasted youth
She spoke and she lied "I am waiting"
Her eyes are empty as she whispers "I love you"
My heart cried "Yes" before my spirit was told...

Ghost in the fog lingering around that bend
As sunlight returns on the earth and leaves this land


Ghost in the fog lingering around that bend
As sunlight returns on the earth and leaves this land

Summer days are miles away, winter is coming
A morning breeze brings autumn round the bend
And your ghost haunts me since you have gone
Still haunting my sleep and drawing me near


When Autumn ends, Winter's beginning
Would there be a reason to stay?
Should I leave without another word
Carry on with what I said
Shed my skin, leave you alone



You've given so much more than I can repay
The years went by without a trace of dismay
Once again time has come for us to part
Lost all pride in tears when we fell apart


I remember now that spring is ending
Time runs out as Summer sets
Don't ever say goodbye unless it’s meant to be
Or speak once again of falling snow
White winter nights always get me
Down in the dumps inside


When April comes, Summer is coming
Would there be a reason to stay?
Should I leave without another word
Carry on with what I said
Shed my skin, leave you alone

Blank stare into empty space
Red mist of deceit
White mark upon your skin
A trail leading straight ahead


Blind devotion is longing for less
Stillness of your gaze leaves you with nothing
Lost souls floating above me
Have I lost all reason?


Leave me be, go away
Don't come back again
Save us both, forget my name
Take me to another place


Blind devotion is longing for less
Stillness of your gaze leaves you with nothing
Lost souls floating above me
Have I lost all reason?


Leave me be, go away
Don't come back again
Save us both, forget my name
Take me to another place



Whispered conjuration
White mark upon your skin
Pale ghost of deceit and sin
And the trail leads straight ahead


Blind devotion is longing for less
Stillness of your gaze leaves you with nothing
Lost souls floating above me
Have I lost all reason?


Leave me be, go away
Don’t come back again
Save us both, forget my name
Take me to another place

Once again, time waits for no one.
Seasons change without warning, and everything crumbles into dust.
Sleep is everlasting...death is forever in the blink of an eye.
Summer turns to winter; spring comes from nowhere to linger but linger not always.


Summer turn to winter... Spring comes from nowhere.... Winter rains fall for years.


Lost memories float on summer breeze to return with Autumn's coming.
Still waters run deeper as a child sets adrift for a while...


Summer turns to winter....Spring comes from nowhere.....Winter rains fall for years


Summer turns to winter.........



Outside the window pane.....Summer turned into autumn....... A tree rustles beneath me........ Winter is coming round
"Winter" came before it went away". " Summer has returned" read some where I should have been by now - a year later when my friends will forget
it all "I wept and said nothing.".... It was meant to be a test




Whisper words of comfort to me....A lullaby lulls my spirit that leave me bereft


Summer turns to winter......Spring comes from nowhere..... Winter rains falls for years

When I was a child, my mother sung me to sleep
She sang "The moon hangs high" and whispered softly "Sleep"


Ah.... The moon hangs high.... Ah....
Ah..... The moon hangs high.... Ah.....
Ah..... The moon hangs high.... Ah.....


Summer's gone round the bend, winter is near
She rose up her head and spoke these words "I fear"

Ah... She rose up her head and spoke these words "I fear"
Ah... She rose up her head and spoke these words "I fear"
Ah.... She rose up her head and spoke these words "I fear"
Ah.... She rose up her head and spoke these words "I fear"



Summer’s gone round the bend, winter is near
She rose up her head and spoke these words “I fear”

Her skin is pale in contrast with a backdrop of autumn leaves
Still she wears white flowers to spite her disease


Ah..... The moon hangs high.... Ah.....
Ah..... The moon hangs high.... Ah.....
Ah..... The moon hangs high.... Ah.....
Ah..... The moon hangs high.... Ah.....

Ghost Dance in Ghost Dance Season
The sands of time, the circle turns
Icy roads beneath my feet
Old memories cast a shadow


She spoke to me and said her name
Her words haunted me like a sigh
"I've waited long for you
Still waiting here for you"


Kept me from leaving after she went away
Restless sleep would linger through the day
She died inside, looked my way
Shedding her skin unto the trees


She wept her sorrows unto me
She clung onto me with both arms
Ghost dance round her neck
She is haunted by loneliness


Kept me from leaving after she went away
Restless sleep would linger through the day
She died inside, looked me in the eye
Shedding her skin unto the trees


She wept her sorrows unto me
She clung onto me with all her might
Ghost dance round her neck
She is haunted by loneliness


Pale ghost in winter biding her time
Shadow looms large over land
Demon lips exhale the mist
Once stuck now lingering around


Ghost in the embers awaiting her mark
Soul left behind in a desolate park
Lost faith in her lonely plight
Tears fall on her lonely plight


White face covered in dirt
Awaiting her mark
